NAME: Welcome to Nirvana!
NOTES: Let's take a few minutes to get acquainted.  :-)We've placed a number of actions here and there with tips to get you started, plus a project named "Brush up on GTD®" for when you're ready to dive deeper.

NAME: On a computer? click the note →
NOTES: If you're on a computer, there are a number of tricks you'll find indispensable: - Drag-n-drop to move and sort - Right-click and see what happens - Press N to create a new action

NAME: On mobile? try these gestures
NOTES: Here are a few gestures you'll want to have at your finger tips when using Nirvana on a mobile device: - Long-press to move me around - Swipe left and see what happens - Pull down to refresh

NAME: Read the Book
NOTES: Getting Things Done: The Art of Stress-Free Productivity, by David Allen https://nirvanahq.com/go/readthebook

NAME: Read our Quick Guide
